notes.anchor: you, with your love for me, would not at this time have gone away
notes.note: Atticus had just left Dyrrachium to return toward Italy; Cicero reads the departure as a sign that even his most loyal friend now thinks the cause hopeless.
The Kalends marked the first of the month; Cicero asks Atticus to rejoin him before 1 January 57 BC, when the new magistrates favourable to his recall would take office.
